results.rendered_html:
anurāgin (von anurāga) adj.
1〉 zugeneigt (= anurakta)  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.  veśyāṃ cānanurāgiṇīm  SĀH. D. 76,21 .
— 2〉 Zuneigung einflössend: dadarśa rājakanyāṃ ca tāmākṛtyānurāgiṇīm  VID. 260 .

results.rendered_html:
anurāgin, anurāgavat a.
1 Attached, enamoured, impassioned, inspired with love; sa vṛddhastasyāmatīvānurāgavān  H. 1 ; sā kenāpi vaṇikputreṇa sahānurāgavatī babhūva ibid.
2 Causing or inspiring love.
— ṇī Personification of a musical note.
